subcodes.first_line:
* Eftirfarandi bæn er fyrir nýfæddum börnum.
* Meybörn:
Ég er komin að boði Guðs, hef verið birt fyrir minningu Hans og
subcodes.notes: Author: BH (Bahá'u'lláh). Newborn prayer with gender variants -- Girls: 'I have come at the bidding of God, been manifested for the remembrance of Him and created to serve Him Who is the Almighty, the Beloved.' Boys: variant. Not found in inventory. X-code candidate (XBH).
